wikis shouldn't be stored in some weird path -- they should be in the project dir itself under ./docs/wiki/

Changed wiki storage path from the external context directory to `project_root/docs/wiki` across multiple source files, keeping daemon state in the external directory. Existing wiki files at the old location won't auto-migrate.
Migrated existing wiki files from the old location to each project's `docs/wiki/` directory using `cp -n`, and skipped worktree entries due to content overlap with main project wikis.
